titleStmt.title: SII 19.22: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 22. (A.R. No. 594 of 1920.) ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This records a gift of 42(1/2) kaḻañju of gold (tulaippoṉ) deposited with the gaṇapperumakkaḷ of the year, for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple and for the daily mid-day offering to the god, with which a Bhaṭṭa well-versed in the Vēda was to be fed able. The offering comprised rice, kummāyam and three other dishes, ghee, curd, sugar, plantains and betel-nut and leaves. The donor's name is given as Kōyil-Peṟṟāḷ alias Guṇavan-Mādēviyār daughter of Bhūpālaśēkhariyār, on whose behalf the king (dēvar ?) is said to have paid the It is perhaps to be inferred that she was his concubine.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecarivarmmarkku yā
ṇṭu 2 Āvatu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrīvi
ranāra yaṇaccaturvvedimaṅgalattu tiruva
nan=teśvarattu paramasvāmikku bhūpālaśekhari
yār makaḷ koyil peṟṟāḷāna kuṇavanmā
deviyār Ikkoyilile candrādityavat Eriya vai
ytta tirunon=tāviḷak konṟukkum Āḻvār madhyāhna
amutu ceytavāṟey vedamvallā noru bhaṭṭanaiy
Avvāṟu Āsamsthitiyāka Uttamāgrattu Oru kalam
candrādittavat Uṇṇappeṟuvatākavum
Avvava kalam Āḻvārkku śrīkāryyam ce
yvārey Ivai Iraṇṭukkum devasthalatti
le koṇṭu ceyvārākavum Ivvāṇṭu
śrīkāryyañceykiṉṟa kaṇapperumakkaḷva
camey devark kuṭutta poṉ tuḷai Ivvū
rkkallāl nāṟppattirukaḻañcarai Ip
paṭṭa ṉuṇṇumpaṭiyāvatu paḻavarici ku
tta lirunāḻiyum kummāya muḷḷiṭṭuk ka
ṟi ñālum ney Āḻākkum tayir nāḻi
yum caṟkarai vaṭṭiraṇṭum vāḻai
yppaḻa miraṇṭum pākku nālum
veṟṟilai pattum Ipparicu Uṇ
ṇappeṟuvitāka vaiyttatu Itu ma
hāsabhaiyār rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.22 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
